settings.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to know about how PAWD dispatches, delivers, and tracks your order — wherever you are in the world.
settings.updated_text: Last Updated: 4 March 2026 · PAWD Australia Pty Ltd

settings.title: Processing Times
settings.body:
All orders are processed within 1–2 business days (Monday–Friday, excluding public holidays). Orders placed after 1pm AEST may not be processed until the following business day. You'll receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking details once your order has been dispatched.
Personalised orders: Allow an additional 2–3 business days for engraving before dispatch. We'll notify you by email when your personalised item ships.

settings.title: Australian Shipping
settings.body:
We offer the following domestic shipping options for Australian customers:
ServiceTimeframeCost
Standard Shipping2–5 business days$8.95 (free over $75)
Express Shipping1–2 business days$14.95
Same-Day (Sydney Metro)Same day (order by 11am)$19.95
Delivery timeframes are estimates from the date of dispatch, not the date of order. Metro areas (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide) typically receive orders at the lower end of the estimated range. Regional and remote areas may experience slightly longer delivery times.

settings.title: International Shipping
settings.body:
PAWD ships to 38+ countries worldwide. All international orders receive free standard shipping.
DestinationStandardExpress
New Zealand3–5 business days2–3 business days
United States7–10 business days3–5 business days
United Kingdom6–9 business days3–5 business days
Canada8–12 business days4–6 business days
Singapore / Asia4–7 business days2–4 business days
Europe (EU)7–12 business days4–6 business days
Free worldwide shipping on all international orders — no minimum spend required. Express international shipping is available at checkout for an additional fee.

settings.title: Tracking Your Order
settings.body:
All orders include tracking. Once dispatched, you'll receive an email containing your tracking number and a direct link to track your parcel in real time. Australian orders are tracked via Australia Post or StarTrack. International orders are tracked via the destination country's postal service once they arrive in-country.
If you haven't received a tracking email within 2 business days of placing your order, check your spam or junk folder. If still missing, contact us at support@pawdstore.com with your order number.

settings.title: Customs & Import Duties
settings.body:
PAWD ships from Australia. International orders may be subject to customs duties, taxes, or import fees imposed by the destination country. These charges are the responsibility of the recipient and are not included in our product prices or shipping fees.
CountryDe Minimis ThresholdNotes
New ZealandNZD $1,000GST on imports above threshold
United StatesUSD $800No duties below this value
United Kingdom£135VAT applies above threshold
CanadaCAD $20Duties + GST/HST may apply
European Union€150VAT applies on all imports
We mark all packages at their full declared value. We do not under-declare or mark shipments as gifts. Contact your local customs authority for specific rates applicable to your region.

settings.title: Failed Deliveries
settings.body:
If a delivery attempt fails (no one home, address inaccessible, premises closed), the carrier will typically leave a card or send a notification with instructions for redelivery or collection from a nearby service point.
If a parcel is returned to us due to an incorrect address provided by the customer, the customer is responsible for the cost of reshipping. If the return is due to a carrier error or our error, we will reship at no cost.
Uncollected parcels are held by the carrier for a limited time (usually 10 business days) before being returned to sender. We recommend tracking your order and collecting promptly if a delivery attempt fails.

settings.title: Personalised Orders
settings.body:
Personalised items require additional processing time for engraving. Please allow 2–3 additional business days on top of our standard processing time before dispatch.
  • Personalised orders are dispatched separately from non-personalised items in the same order
  • You'll receive a separate tracking email for each shipment
  • If you need a personalised item by a specific date, contact us before ordering and we'll advise on lead times
  • Personalised items cannot be cancelled once the engraving process has begun

settings.title: Shipping Partners
settings.body:
PAWD works with the following shipping partners to deliver your orders:
  • Australia Post — Standard domestic deliveries
  • StarTrack — Express domestic deliveries and business addresses
  • Sendle — Carbon-neutral domestic shipping option
  • DHL eCommerce — International standard and express shipments
Carrier selection is determined at the time of dispatch based on destination, service level, and package dimensions. We always select the most reliable option available for your location.
